nasb.text: What more was there to do for My vineyard that I have not done in it? Why, when I expected it to produce good grapes did it produce worthless ones?

esv.text: What more was there to do for my vineyard, that I have not done in it? When I looked for it to yield grapes, why did it yield wild grapes?

cnv.text: 我為我的葡萄園所作的以外，還有甚麼要作的呢？ 我期望它結出好葡萄，它為甚麼倒結出野葡萄呢？

ccb.text: 我不遗余力地料理葡萄园， 希望得到好葡萄， 为什么得到的只是坏葡萄呢？

csbs.text: 为了我的葡萄园， 还有什么该做的事我没有做呢？ 我指望结出好葡萄， 为什么却结出了野葡萄呢？
